Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 65 

ELGBLTY_GRP_CD_LTST 

LABEL: Eligibility Group Code — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: The eligibility group applicable to the beneficiary based on the eligibility determination process for the 
calendar year; most recent in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: ELGBLTY_GRP_CD_LTST 

LONG NAME: ELGBLTY_GRP_CD_LTST 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): Annual DE base
